title: Hibbent Self-Cleaning Rainfall Shower Heads, Fixed Rainfall Shower Head 10 Inch, Round Powerful High Pressure Overhead Shower Head with self-Cleaning Mechanism, Chrome
features: [Effortless Self-Cleaning] Our innovative built-in self-cleaning mechanism ensures hassle-free maintenance. As you turn on the water, the cleaning pin rises, smoothly releasing water, and when you turn off the water, the pin drops, pushing out any accumulated limescale or debris from the water outlet.

[Premium Chrome Finish] The shower head is elegantly coated with a long-lasting chrome plating, adding a touch of sophistication to your bathroom decor. The sleek and shiny surface not only enhances the aesthetics but also resists corrosion and tarnishing.

[360-Degree Adjustable] Enjoy a customizable showering experience with the 360-degree adjustable feature. You can effortlessly adjust the angle of the shower head to suit your preferred position, ensuring a comfortable and relaxing shower every time.

[Versatile Compatibility] Designed with a universal G1/2 interface, our shower head is compatible with most standard shower arms. This means you can easily install it in your existing shower setup without any hassle.

[Enhanced Water Pressure] The compact space inside the shower head is ingeniously designed to maximize water pressure, providing you with a powerful and invigorating shower experience. Say goodbye to weak water flow and enjoy the refreshing sensation of a rainfall-like shower.
